title: Just Some Perfomance Mods
description: This is my minecraft modpack that is mostly for perfomance
body:
Hello this is my modpack as you see it uses Sodium, Sodium extra and Reese’s Sodium options those are most of the performance mods that do the biggest hit. 

Than I use some mods like, Not enough animations, 3D Skin layer, Mod Menu.


And I have a lot of libraries as well like: FerriteCore, Ukulib, e4mc and Fabric language kotlin
